# Atsell

> Atsell is a Southeast Asian ecommerce enabler that helps brands grow sales on Lazada, Shopee, and TikTok Shop. We are an official partner of Lazada, Shopee, and TikTok Shop.

## What We Do

Atsell provides end-to-end ecommerce management for brands selling on Southeast Asian marketplaces. Services include:

- **Store Management**: Full setup, optimisation, and ongoing management of Lazada, Shopee, and TikTok Shop storefronts
- **Marketing & Ads**: Marketplace ads, Facebook Ads, campaign planning and execution
- **Customer Support**: Trained agents handling all buyer enquiries, 6 days a week, 9am–6pm, under 10-second response time
- **Liveselling**: Professional hosts running live commerce streams to drive real-time sales

## Who We Serve

Brands and manufacturers looking to launch or scale their presence on Southeast Asian marketplaces. We operate across Singapore, Malaysia, Vietnam, and Thailand.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2019
- Team size: 30+ people
- Active clients: 100+
- Average revenue growth for clients: 156%
- Official partner of: Lazada, Shopee, TikTok Shop

## Contact

Website: https://atsell.io
Email: Contact via https://atsell.io (consultation booking available)
